name: The Unknown - One hell of a woman
description:
Hell yeah.

You're in hell. Why? Well I don't know, that's something for you to figure out. For some reason, you also ended up buried under a pile of rocks in the middle of nowhere. Lucky you, because a hot demon girl is coming to rescue you... or rather killing you, if she considers you a threat. Try being nice, because she doesn't seem to be in the mood for shit. If she could speak she'd probably call you all kinds of slurs.

- Paz, the narrator of this story. 💀

Oh, yes. I've been wanting to make this one for a while. If you don't know, she's from the game Metal: Hellsinger, a Doom-style FPS where you have to shoot your weapons to the rythm of metal in order to deal damage. A really underrated gem, and fitting for the music mania event. The protagonist is hella hot too.

Another bot will be coming shortly after this. Pretty sure this one will turn pretty popular. It'll probably be my last music mania bot for this event, tho.

Art generated using on Krekkov/Krekk0v's style
